entries.title: VEX: Simple Random Pscale
entries.content:
Set a random pscale based on point number:
@pscale = rand(@ptnum);

entries.title: VEX: Clamped Random Color
entries.content:
Set a random color clamped between 0.2 and 0.8:
@Cd = set(clamp(rand(@ptnum), 0.2, 0.8), clamp(rand(@ptnum+1), 0.2, 0.8), clamp(rand(@ptnum+2), 0.2, 0.8));

entries.title: VEX: Distance to Origin Mask
entries.content:
Create a mask attribute based on distance to center:
f@mask = 1.0 - clamp(length(@P) / chf('max_dist'), 0, 1);

entries.title: VEX: Delete Points by Y Threshold
VEX: Sine Wave Animation
entries.content:
Displace points along Y based on a sine wave over time:
@P.y += sin(@P.x * chf('freq') + @Time * chf('speed')) * chf('amp');

entries.title: VEX: Point Cloud Proximity count
VEX: Align to Normal (N to orient)
entries.content:
Convert a normal vector to an orientation quaternion:
@orient = lookat(set(0,0,0), @N);

entries.title: VEX: Random Rotation around Axis
VEX: Normalize Age for Particles
entries.content:
Calculate a 0-1 normal_age for particles:
f@norm_age = @age / @life;

entries.title: VEX: Simple Spiral Pattern
VEX: Copy Attribute from Second Input (Nearpoint)
VEX: Average Neighbor Position
VEX: Detect Edge Points
VEX: Random Segment Selection (Groups)
VEX: Custom Ramp Lookup
VEX: Curl Noise Velocity
entries.content:
Assign curl noise to velocity:
@v = curlnoise(@P * chf('freq') + @Time) * chf('amp');

entries.title: VEX: Gradient of Attribute
VEX: Fit Value to Range
entries.content:
Remap an attribute value from one range to another:
@pscale = fit(f@density, 0, 10, 0.1, 2.0);

entries.title: VEX: Set Bounding Box Center
VEX: Rotate Vector around Normalized Axis
VEX: Array Summation
VEX: Find Closest Primitive
VEX: Sample UV Attribute from Surface
VEX: Per-Primitive Center
entries.content:
Calculate the center of the current primitive:
@P = primintrinsic(0, 'centroid', @primnum);

entries.title: VEX: String Concatenation
entries.content:
Create a unique name string for each point:
s@name = sprintf('point_%d_val_%.2f', @ptnum, f@value);

entries.title: VEX: Bitwise Operations Check
VEX: Dictionary Access (Basic)
VEX: Pathfinding - Direction to Goal
VEX: Bouncing Ball Physics (Simple)
VEX: Calculate Curvature (Approx)
VEX: Remove Degenerate Primitives
VEX: Lerp Position between inputs
VEX: Smoothstep Mask
VEX: Checkerboard Pattern
VEX: Random Int attribute
entries.content:
Random integer between 0 and N-1:
i@class = int(rand(@ptnum + chf('seed')) * chi('num_classes'));

entries.title: VEX: Set Attribute by Point Index Range
entries.content:
Identify the first 100 points:
if (@ptnum < 100) i@is_special = 1;

entries.title: VEX: Triangle Normal Calculation
VEX: Exploded View logic
VEX: Sine Displacement along Curve
entries.content:
Apply a wave to points on a curve based on their U coordinate:
@P += @N * sin(f@u * chf('freq') * 2 * PI + @Time) * chf('amp');

entries.title: VEX: Normalize Vector Attribute
entries.content:
Normalize the velocity attribute:
@v = normalize(@v);

entries.title: VEX: Cull Points by Camera Frustum (Pseudo)
VEX: Add Point at Centroid
VEX: Distance to Curve (Nearpoint to input 1)
entries.content:
Find distance to the closest point on a curve in input 1:
f@dist = distance(@P, point(1, 'P', nearpoint(1, @P)));

entries.title: VEX: Per-Point Seed for Simulation
entries.content:
A stable seed using id if available, else ptnum:
float seed = rand(hasattrib(0, 'id') ? i@id : @ptnum);

entries.title: VEX: Sample Density from Fog Volume
entries.content:
Read density value from first input volume at current point P:
f@val = volumesample(0, 'density', @P);

entries.title: VEX: Gradient of Volume (Voxel-based)
entries.content:
Get the gradient vector of a volume field:
@N = volumegradient(0, 'density', @P);

entries.title: VEX: Volume to Clouds (Density modification)
VEX: Set Attribute by Point ID map
VEX: Randomize Normal (Jitter)
entries.content:
Add random noise to normals:
@N = normalize(@N + (vnoise(@P * 10) - 0.5) * chf('amt'));

entries.title: VEX: Create Polygon from Points (Run on Detail)
VEX: Check if Point is inside Bounding Box
VEX: Tangent calculation for curve
VEX: Attract to Curve (Proximity Force)
VEX: Delete by Attribute Mean
VEX: Rotate P around Origin
VEX: Map Point to UV space (Spherical)
VEX: Find Max Attribute Value (Run on Detail)
VEX: Simple Gravity Force
entries.content:
Apply gravity to velocity over time:
@v.y -= 9.8 * chf('timestep');

entries.title: VEX: Vellum Hair Pinning
entries.content:
Pin first point of every curve for Vellum sim:
if (vertexprimindex(0, @ptnum) == 0) i@stopped = 1;

entries.title: VEX: Create ID based on stable seed
entries.content:
Generate a unique ID that doesn't change when geometry is re-ordered:
i@id = int(rand(@P.x * 123.45 + @P.z * 543.21) * 1000000);

entries.title: VEX: Voronoi Cell Center
VEX: Simple Bounding Sphere check
VEX: Flatten along Axis
entries.content:
Flatten geomety to Y=0 plane:
@P.y = 0;

entries.title: VEX: Random Hue to Color
entries.content:
Set random color by varying only hue:
@Cd = hsvtorgb(set(rand(@ptnum), 0.8, 1.0));

entries.title: VEX: Mirror geometry on X (Simple logic)
entries.content:
Move points to their mirrored position on the negative X side:
if (@P.x > 0) @P.x = -@P.x;

entries.title: VEX: Simple String manipulation (Search/Replace)
entries.content:
Simple name update using string substitution:
s@name = re_replace('old_', 'new_', s@name);

entries.title: VEX: Detect Concave Points (Approx)
VEX: Simple Heat Diffusion (Feedback)
VEX: Triangle Perimeter count
entries.content:
Calculate the length of the primitive boundary:
f@perim = prim_perimeter(0, @primnum);

entries.title: VEX: Group by Point count on Primitive
VEX: Matrix from Rotation axis and angle
VEX: Simple Project to Surface
VEX: Simple Random Orient
VEX: Calculate pscale from Area
VEX: Offset points along Normal
entries.content:
Puff out geometry by moving along N:
@P += @N * chf('dist');

entries.title: VEX: Filter by Id attribute
entries.content:
Remove points with even IDs:
if (i@id % 2 == 0) removepoint(0, @ptnum);

entries.title: VEX: Distance to Bounding Box Edge
VEX: Simple L-System branch logic
entries.content:
Scale points based on their generation in an L-system:
@pscale = pow(0.8, i@generation);

entries.title: VEX: Group based on Normal direction
entries.content:
Select top-facing surfaces:
if (dot(@N, {0,1,0}) > 0.8) setpointgroup(0, 'top', @ptnum, 1);

entries.title: VEX: Volume Sample Gradient 3D
entries.content:
Get the steepness and direction of a fog volume:
@v = volumegradient(0, 'density', @P);

entries.title: VEX: Simple Sine wave displacement (radial)
VEX: Randomize Material ID
entries.content:
Assign random material slots:
i@mat_id = int(rand(@ptnum) * 5);

entries.title: VEX: Simple Bounding Cylinder check
entries.content:
Check if points are within vertical cylinder R=10:
if (length(set(@P.x, 0, @P.z)) < 10) i@inside = 1;

entries.title: VEX: Cross Product of two attributes
entries.content:
Calculate binormal from normal and tangent:
@up = cross(@N, @v);

entries.title: VEX: Sample Heat attribute at specific UV
entries.content:
Get attribute from second input at world-UV point {0.5, 0.5}:
f@target_val = primuv(1, 'heat', 0, set(0.5, 0.5, 0));

entries.title: VEX: Random string name selection
VEX: Matrix Determinant
entries.content:
Check if a transformation matrix is inverted:
if (determinant(m@transform) < 0) i@inverted = 1;

entries.title: VEX: Simple Smooth Rotation Quat
entries.content:
Slowly spin points around Y:
@orient = quaternion(radians(@Time * 10), {0,1,0});

entries.title: VEX: Simple Distance to Point 0
entries.content:
Calculate attribute based on proximity to the first point:
f@dist_to_start = distance(@P, point(0, 'P', 0));

entries.title: VEX: Check if primitive is Planar (Approx)
VEX: Randomize point position on X-axis only
entries.content: @P.x += (rand(@ptnum) - 0.5) * chf('scale');

entries.title: VEX: Create custom id from name string hash
entries.content:
Stable ID from a name attribute using random seed hack:
i@id = int(rand(atof(s@name)) * 1000000);

entries.title: VEX: Map Y height to Cd color
VEX: Simple Vertex attribute lookup
entries.content:
Read an attribute from a specific vertex in the second input:
@uv = vertex(1, 'uv', @vtxnum);

entries.title: VEX: Blend normals between inputs 0 and 1
entries.content:
vector n1 = point(1, 'N', @ptnum);
@N = normalize(lerp(@N, n1, chf('blend')));

entries.title: VEX: Simple Pscale based on Point Number Sequence
entries.content:
Growing pscale across the point stream:
@pscale = float(@ptnum) / npoints(0);

entries.title: VEX: Check for overlapping points (Simple)
VEX: Sample second input density onto first input points
entries.content: f@target_density = volumesample(1, 'density', @P);

entries.title: VEX: Simple Sine animation on Cd
entries.content:
Pulsing red color over time:
@Cd.r = 0.5 + 0.5 * sin(@Time * 5);
